query:
INSERT INTO achievements (name, description, category) VALUES 
('First Steps', 'Create your profile and customize it', 'social_good'),
('Coin Collector', 'Earn your first 100 Anom Coins', 'social_good'),
('Level Up!', 'Reach level 5', 'milestones'),
('Family Hero', 'Help 5 family members in a lounge', 'social_good'),
('Game Master', 'Win 10 mini-games', 'games'),
('Trivia Champion', 'Score 100% on Trivia', 'games'),
('Memory Expert', 'Complete Neon Memory in under 30 seconds', 'games'),
('Mood Matcher', 'Match 50 moods correctly', 'games'),
('Snack Vault Master', 'Collect 1000 snacks in Snack Vault Rush', 'games'),
('Kids Corner Explorer', 'Complete all Kids Corner lessons', 'social_good'),
('Lounge Founder', 'Create your first private lounge', 'milestones'),
('Social Butterfly', 'Earn 500 Anom Coins from social good actions', 'social_good');
